name: dev-workflow-marketplace
description: Personal marketplace hosting the dev-workflow plugin

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: PRD-first development workflow with testing built in: PRDs, phased plans (tests ship per phase), multi-lens plan reviews (clarifying-questions, deep-critique, and adversarial red-team passes), a docs-first research sub-agent, implementation tracking, Playwright e2e tests via bundled MCP, 7-reviewer code reviews with a test-execution pass, tradeoff decisions, and doc audits.
